artifact_path_stability.meaning: reruns keep case-scoped output paths stable in shape without reusing prior scope

usage_linkage_stability.meaning: usage linkage fields remain stable across reruns

provenance_linkage_stability.meaning: provenance linkage remains stable across reruns

governance_receipt_stability.meaning: governance receipt path and core fields stay stable across reruns

queue_state_stability.meaning: queue state and inspect semantics do not drift across reruns

source_contract_id_stability.meaning: source contract ids remain stable across reruns for selected source anchors

fanout_aggregate_shared_summary_stabilit.meaning: fanout aggregate/shared-summary behavior remains stable across reruns

helper_report_artifact_check_stability.meaning: artifact helpers keep reporting the same S3 truth across reruns

false_stability_controls: fresh basetemp and cache scope per rerun
fresh out_root and receipt scope per rerun
fresh child/aggregate output scope per rerun
not_claimed: cloud or Kubernetes load test stability
